title: Marketplace Manager - WOW Skin Science - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - WOW Skin Science - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with WOW Skin Science! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About WOW Skin Science:
WOW Skin Science is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science!
